channel.title: PipeWire on Cyber Security & Linux | Murat Kurkoglu - orioninsist
channel.description: Recent content in PipeWire on Cyber Security & Linux | Murat Kurkoglu - orioninsist

item.title: Essential Wayland Tools for a Fast and Stable Sway Setup (2025 Developer Edition)
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: A complete guide to the essential Wayland-native tools that make Sway fast, stable, and productivity-ready for developers. Includes tool list, configurations, and workflow optimization tips.

item.title: Fix Sway Volume Keys & Binding Warnings for Good
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: A definitive guide to configuring volume keys in the Sway window manager on Arch Linux. Learn to use pamixer and fix the 'Overwriting binding' warning for good.

item.title: Ditch the GUI: Mastering PipeWire Audio in Arch CLI
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: I detail my full transition from Pavucontrol to CLI-only audio management on Arch Linux with Sway/PipeWire, using WirePlumber rules and wpctl for a minimal workflow.
